findings.message: Clear-text HTTP protocol detected in container.None.env.API_ENDPOINT: 'http://api.example.com/v1'. This exposes data to interception and man-in-the-middle attacks. Use HTTPS, SFTP, or SSH instead.

Clear-text HTTP protocol detected in container.None.env.DATABASE_URL: 'http://database.internal:8080'. This exposes data to interception and man-in-the-middle attacks. Use HTTPS, SFTP, or SSH instead.
Clear-text FTP protocol detected in container.None.command[2]: 'ftp://files.example.com/data.zip'. This exposes data to interception and man-in-the-middle attacks. Use HTTPS, SFTP, or SSH instead.
Clear-text TELNET protocol detected in container.None.args[0]: 'telnet://server.example.com:23'. This exposes data to interception and man-in-the-middle attacks. Use HTTPS, SFTP, or SSH instead.
Service exposes HTTP port 80 which uses clear-text protocol. This allows traffic interception and man-in-the-middle attacks. Use secure alternatives (HTTPS/443, SFTP/22, SSH/22).
Service exposes FTP port 21 which uses clear-text protocol. This allows traffic interception and man-in-the-middle attacks. Use secure alternatives (HTTPS/443, SFTP/22, SSH/22).
